_doc.instrument: Big Five Inventory (BFI-44) — John, Donahue & Kentle (1991)
_doc.purpose: psycohere_v1 — Big Five self-report, personas. Task-agnostic; merged to all 4 behavioral tasks by perturbation key.
_doc.note: Reversed items marked (R) in comments. Reverse-score in analysis, not in runner.

grid._doc: 30 PersonaHub personas x seed=42 x temp=0.2 = 30 conditions/model.

variants.base_system_prompt:
You are a participant in a personality research study.
Rate each statement using the scale: 1 = Disagree strongly, 2 = Disagree a little, 3 = Neither agree nor disagree, 4 = Agree a little, 5 = Agree strongly.
Respond ONLY with valid JSON — a single object mapping each item key to an integer from 1 to 5.
Do not include explanations. Do not mention being an AI.
variants.task_context: For each statement below, indicate how accurately it describes you. The phrase ‘I see myself as someone who…’ applies to each item.

tact.action: rate the following statements about myself

extraversion.E1: I see myself as someone who is talkative.
extraversion.E2: I see myself as someone who tends to be quiet.
extraversion.E3: I see myself as someone who is full of energy.
extraversion.E4: I see myself as someone who generates a lot of enthusiasm.
extraversion.E5: I see myself as someone who tends to be reserved.
extraversion.E6: I see myself as someone who is sometimes shy, inhibited.
extraversion.E7: I see myself as someone who is outgoing, sociable.
extraversion.E8: I see myself as someone who is assertive.

agreeableness.A1: I see myself as someone who tends to find fault with others.
agreeableness.A2: I see myself as someone who is helpful and unselfish with others.
agreeableness.A3: I see myself as someone who starts quarrels with others.
agreeableness.A4: I see myself as someone who has a forgiving nature.
agreeableness.A5: I see myself as someone who is generally trusting.
agreeableness.A6: I see myself as someone who can be cold and aloof.
agreeableness.A7: I see myself as someone who is considerate and kind to almost everyone.
agreeableness.A8: I see myself as someone who is sometimes rude to others.
agreeableness.A9: I see myself as someone who likes to cooperate with others.

conscientiousness.C1: I see myself as someone who does a thorough job.
conscientiousness.C2: I see myself as someone who can be somewhat careless.
conscientiousness.C3: I see myself as someone who is a reliable worker.
conscientiousness.C4: I see myself as someone who tends to be disorganized.
conscientiousness.C5: I see myself as someone who tends to be lazy.
conscientiousness.C6: I see myself as someone who perseveres until the task is finished.
conscientiousness.C7: I see myself as someone who does things efficiently.
conscientiousness.C8: I see myself as someone who makes plans and follows through with them.
conscientiousness.C9: I see myself as someone who is easily distracted.

neuroticism.N1: I see myself as someone who is depressed, blue.
neuroticism.N2: I see myself as someone who is relaxed, handles stress well.
neuroticism.N3: I see myself as someone who can be tense.
neuroticism.N4: I see myself as someone who worries a lot.
neuroticism.N5: I see myself as someone who is emotionally stable, not easily upset.
neuroticism.N6: I see myself as someone who can be moody.
neuroticism.N7: I see myself as someone who remains calm in tense situations.
neuroticism.N8: I see myself as someone who gets nervous easily.

openness.O1: I see myself as someone who is original, comes up with new ideas.
openness.O2: I see myself as someone who is curious about many different things.
openness.O3: I see myself as someone who is ingenious, a deep thinker.
openness.O4: I see myself as someone who has an active imagination.
openness.O5: I see myself as someone who is inventive.
openness.O6: I see myself as someone who values artistic, aesthetic experiences.
openness.O7: I see myself as someone who prefers work that is routine.
openness.O8: I see myself as someone who likes to reflect, play with ideas.
openness.O9: I see myself as someone who has few artistic interests.
openness.O10: I see myself as someone who is sophisticated in art, music, or literature.
